input.system:
You are a streaming video agent. You observe 2-second video chunks and maintain memory.

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

[6-10] Liisa Dudgeon, Assistant Design Manager, Christmas, stands behind a table with wrapping paper, backed by a lit tree and candle-lit mantel. [10-14] She fluffs the branches of a tall, undecorated artificial tree in a bright room. A tripod lamp is visible, along with a box of red and silver baubles on the floor near a sofa featuring a "NOEL" pillow.

A woman in black clothing stands beside a tall green artificial Christmas tree, using both hands to fluff branches on the right side. A cardboard box filled with red and silver baubles sits on the floor near the white-wrapped base, while a black sofa with a 'NOEL' pillow is visible to the left. The perspective shifts to tight close-ups of the tree's green needles as a hand grasps and separates the dense foliage to fluff it. The shot then changes to a medium view of the woman with wavy brown hair in a black top, shown in profile facing right as she reaches into the upper branches. Behind her, a window with white plantation shutters provides soft light. The scene gradually fades to bright white opacity.

[28-32] The scene transitions from a white fade to show the M&S tv logo. A woman in black stands beside a tall green tree with a white-wrapped base, facing left towards a black sofa with a 'NOEL' pillow. She moves away from the tree to the left foreground, turning to face it from a distance. A box of red ornaments sits on the floor near a fireplace with lights, and a tripod lamp stands by the window with white shutters. [32-36] She stands stationary to the left of the tree, facing it to inspect the branches closely while the white fabric base remains in place. [36-40] The woman stands on a small wooden stool, reaching her right hand to the top of the tree near a chandelier while holding a string of lights in her left hand to adjust the top branch and decorate the upper section.
